12-207.name: Isabela Madrigal - Such a Lovely Voice
12-207.bodyText:
Singer 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to
sing songs.)
NEW MOTIF When you play this character, if you
removed 1 or more damage from one of your
characters this turn, gain 1 lore.

12-208.name: Mirage - Super Recruiter
12-208.bodyText:
BUSINESS ARRANGEMENT When you play this
character, if you have a Super or Hero character
in play, you may draw a card.

12-209.name: Edna Mode - Fashion Designer
12-209.bodyText:
NO CAPES! When you play this character, you
may return chosen item with cost 2 or less to its
player's hand. If you do, its player draws a card.
MAKING SUPERS FABULOUS Whenever this
character quests, your Super characters get +1 ◊
this turn.

12-210.name: Doc - Taking Notes
12-210.bodyText:
SHARE KNOWLEDGE When you play this character,
if you have another Seven Dwarfs character or a
Princess character in play, draw a card.

12-212.name: Donald Duck - Distracted Traveler
12-212.bodyText:
BURNING CURIOSITY Whenever this character
quests, if you played another character this turn,
each opponent chooses and discards a card.

12-213.name: Merida - Gifted Archer
12-213.bodyText:
Shift 3 ⬡ (You may pay 3 ⬡ to play this on top of
one of your characters named Merida.)
FIERCE PROTECTION While this character is
exerted, whenever an opposing character
challenges, you may deal 1 damage to the
challenging character.

12-214.name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Crystallized Commander
12-214.bodyText:
Shift 4 ⬡ (You may pay 4 ⬡ to play this on top of
one of your characters named Lyle Tiberius Rourke.)
PLAN'S CHANGED When you play this character, put
the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard. Then,
you may return an action card with cost 4 or less
from your discard to your hand.

12-216.name: Daisy Duck - Trendy Traveler
12-216.bodyText:
BREAK IS OVER Whenever this character quests,
if you played a character this turn, you may ready
another chosen character. If you do, they can't
quest for the rest of this turn.

12-217.name: Kida - Guardian of the Path
12-217.bodyText:
NATURAL DEFENSE When you play this character,
chosen opposing character gets -2 ¤ this turn.

12-218.name: Bruno Madrigal - Oasis Oracle
12-218.bodyText:
FIND THAT VISION Once during your turn, whenever you
remove damage from one of your characters, you may
look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your
hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
YOU'LL BE OKAY Whenever this character quests, you
may remove all damage from chosen character.

12-219.name: Minnie Mouse - Practical Traveler
12-219.bodyText:
DISCERNING EYE Whenever this character
quests, if you played another character this turn,
gain 1 lore.

12-220.name: Pocahontas - Steadfast Traveler
12-220.bodyText:
WANDERING SPIRIT Whenever this character quests,
if you played another character this turn, return a
location card from your discard to your hand.

12-221.name: Incrediboy - Buddy Pine
12-221.bodyText:
NERDING OUT When you play this character, if a
Hero character is in play, gain 1 lore.
SPOILER ALERT This character also counts as
being named Syndrome for Shift.

12-222.name: Three Arrows
12-222.bodyText:
Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Then, you may
deal 1 damage to another chosen character.

12-223.name: Jessie - Lively Cowgirl
12-223.bodyText:
PART OF A FAMILY Whenever this character
quests, if you have 2 or more other Toy
characters in play, you may draw a card.
YODEL-AY-HEE-HOO! Whenever you pay 2 ⬡ or
less to play a card, chosen opposing character
gets -1 ¤ until the start of your next turn.

12-224.name: Isabela Madrigal - Caring Cultivator
12-224.bodyText:
Shift 4 ⬡
DO NO WRONG Whenever you remove
damage from one of your characters, gain 1
lore for each 1 damage removed.

12-225.name: You've Got a Friend in Me
12-225.bodyText:
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up
to 2 Toy character cards and put them into your hand.
Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

12-226.name: Frozone - Super Cool
12-226.bodyText:
Rush
JUST CHILL When you play this character, if
you have another Super character in play, you
may exert chosen opposing character.

12-227.name: Luisa Madrigal - Confident Climber
12-227.bodyText:
Shift 3 ⬡
I CAN TAKE IT 1 ⬡ — Move up to 1 damage from
chosen character of yours to this character.
Then, if this character has 3 or more damage,
move all damage from this character to chosen
opposing character.

12-228.name: DunBroch Family Tapestry
12-228.bodyText:
TORN APART This item enters play exerted.
MEND THE BOND ⟳, Banish this item — Each
player shuffles all character cards from their
discard into their deck.

12-229.name: Alien - True Believer
12-229.bodyText:
WE ARE ONE This character gets +1 ¤ for each
other Toy character you have in play.
HE HAS BEEN CHOSEN During your turn, when
this character is banished, return another
character card named Alien from your discard to
your hand.

12-230.name: Milo Thatch - Getting His Hands Dirty
12-230.bodyText:
Ward
SCHOLAR'S GAMBIT When you play this character, you may
choose and discard a card to return chosen character to
their player's hand.
PRACTICAL KNOWLEDGE At the end of your turn, if 2 or
more cards were put into your discard this turn, draw a card.

12-231.name: The Family Scattered
12-231.bodyText:
Chosen opponent chooses 3 of their characters
and returns one of those cards to their hand, puts
one on the bottom of their deck, and puts one on
the top of their deck.

12-232.name: Jack-Jack Parr - Incredible Potential
12-232.bodyText:
WEIRD THINGS ARE HAPPENING At the start of your turn,
you may put the top card of your deck into your discard.
If its card type is:
• character, this character gets +2 ¤ this turn.
• action or item, this character gets +2 ◊ this turn.
• location, banish chosen character.

12-233.name: The Leviathan - Guardian of Atlantis
12-233.bodyText:
IT'S A MACHINE! When you play this character,
if 2 or more cards were put into your discard
this turn, you may banish any number of
chosen opposing characters with total ¤ 10
or less.

12-234.name: Mr. Incredible - Super Strong
12-234.bodyText:
Shift 3 ⬡
ALWAYS UNITED This character gets +2 ¤ for each
other character you have in play.
LET'S DO THIS! Whenever one of your Super
characters challenges another character, draw a card.

12-235.name: Zipper - Big Helper
12-235.bodyText:
Shift 2 ⬡
BUZZING ENTHUSIASM Whenever this
character quests, you may add his ⛉ to
another chosen character's ¤ this turn.

12-236.name: Kida - Crystal Scion
12-236.bodyText:
Shift 6 ⬡
FLOOD OF POWER When you play this character, each
player may put up to 5 cards from their discard into their
inkwell facedown and exerted.
THE PATH REVEALED 7 ⬡ — Look at the top 2 cards of
your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the
bottom of your deck.

12-237.name: What Else Can I Do?
12-237.bodyText:
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one
into your hand and the other into your inkwell
facedown and exerted. If a character sang this
song, your characters gain Ward until the start of
your next turn.

12-238.name: Syndrome - Out for Revenge
12-238.bodyText:
Shift 4 ⬡
GOT ME MONOLOGUING! Whenever this character
quests, return a Robot character card from your
discard to your hand. Then, you may play or shift a
Robot character with cost 8 or less for free.

12-239.name: Mrs. Incredible - Determined Rescuer
12-239.bodyText:
Shift 5 ⬡
PULL BACK Your characters gain Resist +1.
REGROUP During your turn, whenever another
character is banished in a challenge, you may ready
chosen Super character. If you do, they can't quest
for the rest of this turn.

12-240.name: Touch the Sky
12-240.bodyText:
Move a character of yours to a location for free.
Then, draw cards equal to that location's ◊.

12-241.name: Buzz Lightyear - Jungle Ranger
12-241.bodyText:
Shift 5 ⬡
TAKE CHARGE When you play this character, you may
return an action card with cost 7 or less from your discard to
your hand.
ADVANCED TRAINING Whenever you play an action,
chosen character gets +1 ◊ this turn.

12-242.name: Merida - Formidable Archer
12-242.bodyText:
FULL QUIVER When you play this character, you may
return an action card named Three Arrows from your
discard to your hand.
STEADY AIM Whenever one of your actions deals
damage to an opposing character, deal 2 damage to
that character.
